repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest catalogue items are Q1_MinimalBasis/Q1_StaggeredMinimalBasis regression-basis plim formulas, not synthetic-control common-corner statements

published_prior_art.cite: AbadieDiamondHainmueller2010 plus DoudchenkoImbens2016/BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021/ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021/AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 establish the individual estimator nodes, not the four-node corner framing

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_synth_control_factor_misspec_v1: partial-ID factor-misspecification interval, not convex/affine/SDiD/MC exact-ID domain lattice

published_prior_art.cite: AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 notes common objectives and different identification restrictions, but does not give a strict necessary-and-sufficient exact-ID lattice with minimal witnesses

repo_prior_art.cite: none; API panel entries contain FWL/Gram formulas for treatment-history regressions, not Schur certificates between synthetic-control functional classes

published_prior_art.cite: BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021 and AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 discuss geometry/regularization restrictions, but not an observable adjacent-pair Schur equality/separation certificate

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem switches from the declared functionals phi_m to 'evaluated at the same affine weights' and 'evaluated at time weights summing to one'; restate it for the actual ASCM/SDiD normal-equation functionals or add assumptions that those optimizers select the displayed weights.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The certificate S includes the full Schur block Omega, but equality of ATT functionals can hold when added higher coordinates have residual variance yet zero moment/evaluation effect; the iff needs an ATT-relevant projected Schur/Riesz condition rather than raw S=0.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a one-line normal-equation lemma for Theorem 1 showing exact convex balance makes the ASCM, SDiD, and MC population optimizers return the common counterfactual, rather than merely evaluating those methods at chosen weights.

Replace the Conjecture 2 certificate with a projected certificate that tests whether the higher-method Riesz representer changes the ATT evaluation, and include the harmless-extra-coordinate boundary case as a sanity check.

Add a small comparison paragraph noting that BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021 explicitly relates ASCM to SDiD-style constrained outcome regression; use it to sharpen why the proposed lattice is not just that relationship restated.

recommended_next_step: Revise the statement layer for Theorem 1 and Conjecture 2, then rerun Stage -0.5 before moving to derivation.
